author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Scorecard Signed-Releases (-1→10): attach signed build artifacts with provenance to GitHub releases

The release workflow uploads the packed npm tarball (plus checksums) as GitHub release assets with cryptographic signatures/provenance (SLSA generator or cosign keyless — free for public repos); Scorecard Signed-Releases scores on the next release; documented in docs

message: Scorecard reports 'no releases found' because releases carry no artifact assets — it scores signed ARTIFACTS on releases. npm provenance already ships (CLOSED pm-mwap); this extends the same supply-chain story to GitHub release assets. Natural fit with pm-3z0k portable integrity attestation (detached hash-chain proof bundle could ship as a release asset too). Agent-executable; touches release.yml/auto-release.yml.

author: codex-audit-20260715

patch.value: Publish signed release artifacts, checksums, and verifiable provenance so GitHub releases provide supply-chain evidence and Scorecard can score Signed-Releases.
